10590386.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
10590386.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

10590872.title: Anderson Cooper 360
10590872.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

10591847.title: Don Lemon Tonight
10591847.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

10592578.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
10592578.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

10592999.title: World Sport
10592999.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10593083.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
10593083.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

10593986.title: World Sport
10593986.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10594081.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
10594081.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

10594527.title: CNN Newsroom with Kim Brunhuber
10594527.description: Kim Brunhuber brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

10595044.title: Early Start
10595044.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

10595484.title: New Day With John Berman and Brianna Keilar
10595484.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

10596915.title: World Sport
10596915.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10596993.title: First Move With Julia Chatterley
10596993.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

10597502.title: Connect the World
10597502.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10597924.title: World Sport
10597924.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10598009.title: Connect the World
10598009.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10598476.title: Inside Politics
10598476.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

10598953.title: Inside Africa
10598953.description: From superbikes to racecars and beyond, highlighting some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels and providing an inside look at what life is like on and off the race track.

10599028.title: Amanpour
10599028.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

10599522.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
10599522.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

10600063.title: Quest Means Business
10600063.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

10600530.title: The Lead With Jake Tapper
10600530.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

10601031.title: The Situation Room With Wolf Blitzer
10601031.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.
